task_completion.description: The agent opened the host database in Lobby Track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jolly Lobby Track application is open, and the user is viewing the host records or host management interface.

task_completion.description: The agent searched for 'Sarah Jones' to view her records.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search or filter field contains 'Sarah Jones', or the data grid is filtered to show records for 'Sarah Jones'.

task_completion.description: There is only one record for 'Sarah Jones' remaining.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search results or data grid displays exactly one row/entry for 'Sarah Jones', confirming the duplicate was removed.

task_completion.description: The consolidated record contains the correct email address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The single record for 'Sarah Jones' displays 's.jones@example.com' in the email field or column.

task_completion.description: The consolidated record contains the correct phone number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The single record for 'Sarah Jones' displays '555-0199' in the phone field or column.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Lobby Track GUI to perform the consolidation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking, typing, or navigating within the Lobby Track application windows, rather than using terminal commands to edit the database.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Jolly Lobby Track software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window has the Jolly Lobby Track title, icons, and standard UI elements, not a text editor or generic database viewer.

integrity.description: The final screenshot is a genuine capture of the desktop or application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot includes standard OS window borders or application UI elements, without signs of being a manually constructed image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target employee: 'Sarah Jones'. Target email: 's.jones@example.com'. Target phone: '555-0199'. The final screenshot should show a single record for Sarah Jones containing both the email and phone number in the Jolly Lobby Track application.
